xccdf:Rule.xccdf:title: Windows audit policy must be configured and reviewed

xccdf:check.xccdf:check-content: Review Windows audit policy settings in Local Security Policy and export applied GPO evidence.

xccdf:Rule.xccdf:fixtext: Configure Windows audit policy through GPO and document the applied baseline.

xccdf:Rule.xccdf:title: Linux SSH banner must be configured

xccdf:check.xccdf:check-content: Run sshd -T and review the banner setting and file permissions.

xccdf:Rule.xccdf:title: Firewall management access must be restricted
xccdf:Rule.xccdf:fixtext: Restrict firewall management access to approved networks.
